SEARCH

IZ Gateway Hub 2.10.0 2.10.0-SNAPSHOT API

Packages
Package
Description
gov.cdc.izgateway
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.mockdex
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.db
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb
The dynamodb package contains packages and classes supporting integration of IZ Gateway Hub with DynamoDB as it's back end database.
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model
Contains classes representing the entities stored in DynamoDB
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository
Contains the classes necessary to support a repository of objects in a DynamoDB table.
gov.cdc.izgateway.elastic
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub
This package houses the SOAP Controllers used by IZ Gateway for sending and receiving SOAP Messages.
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.repository
This package defines the interfaces that must be supported by a repository used by the services in the service package.
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.hub.service.accesscontrol
This package contains classes and interfaces related to access control services within the IZ Gateway Hub application.
gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.mock
This package contains classes supporting mock endpoints.
gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.mock.perf
 
gov.cdc.izgateway.status
 
gov.cdc.perf.histogram
